'''Natinati''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]. One of the main [[City/Legends|cities]] was [[Poborandurannum]], where [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] once rented a secret chamber.

==Inhabitants==
By [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], Natinati boasted a population of less than a million [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jabba the Hutt: Betrayal]]'' {{1stm}}
